feed.indexTagline: Your content. Your vibe. Your rules.

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for could not be found.
notFound.heading: This page doesn't exist.

list.seoDescription: Pledge funding for concrete actions, evidence, or outcomes you want to inspire.
list.heroBody: Fund concrete actions, evidence, and outcomes. People reply with submissions, and the community rewards the work that moves the goal forward.
list.loginToCreate: Log in to create a pledge
list.sectionTagline: Help fund the actions worth making.
list.emptyHint: Be the first to create a pledge.
list.emptyHintCountry: Be the first to create a pledge for {{country}}.

card.confirmDelete: Delete this pledge? This cannot be undone.

create.seoDescription: Create a donor pledge to inspire concrete action on {{appName}}.
create.loginGateTitle: Log in to create a pledge
create.loginGateBody: Pledges are signed Nostr events. You need a Nostr login to publish one.
create.heading: Create pledge
create.title: Title
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain the action, evidence, or outcome you want to inspire, what submissions should include, and how you plan to evaluate them...
create.timezoneNote: Start and deadline times will be interpreted in this timezone.
create.errorLoginRequired: You must be logged in to create a pledge.
create.errorPledgeInvalid: Pledge amount must be a positive USD amount.
create.errorPriceUnavailable: Waiting for BTC/USD price to calculate the pledge amount.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Cover image must be a valid https:// URL.
create.errorDeadlinePast: Deadline cannot be in the past.

detail.submissionPlaceholder: Share proof, evidence, or completed work...
detail.noSubmissionsHint: Be the first to reply with proof, evidence, or completed work.
detail.trustNote: This pledge is trust-based. Funding progress sums zaps and donation receipts on top-level submissions.
detail.storyEmpty: The pledger hasn't written details for this pledge yet.

list.seoDescription: Discover and join groups on Nostr
list.heroBody: Create groups, gather members, and keep up with what your spaces are doing.
list.createGroupLoginTitle: Log in to create a group
list.createGroupLoginBody: Creating a group publishes a Nostr event from your account.
list.loginToSeeTitle: Log in to see your groups
list.loginToSeeBody: Groups you've founded or moderate will appear here.
list.noGroupsBody: Create your own group to start coordinating campaigns, pledges, and events with your people.
list.noFeaturedBody: {{appName}} moderators feature standout groups here. Check back soon.
list.needsReviewDesc: {{appName}} groups that haven't been featured or hidden yet. Lift one into the Featured shelf or suppress it with Hide.
list.hiddenDesc: Groups suppressed from public discovery. Use the kebab menu on a card to unhide.

create.loginGateTitle: Log in to start a group
create.loginGateBody: Groups are signed Nostr events. You need a Nostr login to publish one.
create.invalidEditBody: This group edit link is missing a valid group address.
create.cannotEditBody: Only the founder of this group can update it.
create.name: Name
create.errorLoginRequired: You must be logged in to create a group.
create.errorEditLoadFailed: Group could not be loaded for editing.
create.errorEditNotOwner: Only the group founder can edit this group.
create.errorNameInvalid: Name must include letters or numbers so a group URL can be created.
create.errorEditLatestMissing: Could not find the latest version of this group to update.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Cover image must be a valid https:// URL.
create.errorSlugCollision: You already have a group with the identifier "{{slug}}". Choose another name.

home.heroBody: Raise Bitcoin directly from supporters around the world. Every donation settles straight to your wallet, with no middlemen, no chargebacks, and no platform holding your funds.
home.communityDesc: Help fund the changes worth making.
home.pendingDesc: Campaigns on the network that no Team Soapbox moderator has approved or hidden yet.
home.hiddenDesc: Campaigns suppressed from the public homepage. Use the kebab menu on a card to unhide.
home.yourCampaignsDesc: Your campaigns are live on Nostr and donations work via the campaign link. They appear on the homepage once a Team Soapbox moderator approves them.
home.emptyHint: Be the first to start a fundraiser on {{appName}}. Tell your story, choose your beneficiaries, and share the link.

all.title: All Campaigns
all.description: Browse every campaign published on Agora.
all.noMatchHint: Try a different search term, or clear the search to see every campaign.
all.allHiddenHint: Every campaign on the network has been hidden by moderators. Toggle “Show hidden” to view them.
all.emptyHint: No campaigns have been published yet. Be the first.

settings.title: Settings

sections.profileDesc: Display name, bio, avatar, and verification.
sections.languageDesc: Choose the language used throughout the app.
sections.organizersDesc: Appoint country organizers who can pin posts to country feeds.

settings.loginRequired: You need to be signed in to manage organizers.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose how the app looks.
appearance.intro: Pick your preferred color mode. System will automatically match your device's light or dark setting.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Relays are servers that store and distribute content across the Nostr network. Blossom servers handle file uploads.
network.connectionsIntro: Manage your relay connections. Relays are servers that store and distribute Nostr events across the network.
network.uploadQualityDesc: Compressed resizes large images and picks the smallest format. Original uploads images exactly as-is.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options for power users.
advanced.intro: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used throughout the app.
language.intro: Select your preferred language. The app will switch immediately and remember your choice on this device.
language.translationNote: Translations are a work in progress. Untranslated text falls back to English.

organizers.appointDesc: Grant a user permission to pin posts on a specific country feed.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: This user is already an organizer for that country
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Only platform admins can appoint or remove organizers.
